Release notes for Pebble firmware update adding ANCS support and fixing various notification issues.

# Purpose
The content describes updates and bug fixes for a software release related to the Pebble smartwatch. It adds support for Apple Notification Center Service (ANCS) notifications for users with specific iOS devices, requiring the Pebble iOS app version 1.3 or greater. The update increases the number of unread notifications that the Pebble can display from 8 to over 80. Bug fixes address issues such as caller-ID display during phone calls, call dismissal via the back button, and persistent vibration. Additionally, new iOS users no longer need to manage address book access to view Caller ID, and a problem with settings being lost after a reboot has been resolved.
